arabic: عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ: «لَا يَقْضِيَنَّ حَكَمٌ بَيْنَ اثْنَيْنِ وَهُوَ غَضْبَانُ»

english.text:
Abu Bakra told that he heard God’s Messenger say, “No judge must give judgment between two people when he is angry.” 

(Bukhari and Muslim.)

chapter.english: The Offices of Commander and Qadi
